---
title = "My Calepin Notebook"
subtitle = "A computational notebook"
author = "Your Name"
---

This is a *Calepin* notebook. Write prose in Markdown and embed executable code chunks.

## Getting started

Here is an R code chunk. Set `eval: true` to run it:

```{r}
#| eval: false
summary(mtcars[, 1:4])
```

And a Python chunk:

```{python}
#| eval: false
import math
[round(math.sin(x / 10), 3) for x in range(10)]
```
